title: Totem of Undying Aizen
description: This pack transforms the Totem of Undying into Sōsuke Aizen
body:
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9798c3c458e638386c2f16727baa194d2d379223.png)

# 🔵 Bleach Totem – Sōsuke Aizen

Experience control, power, and quiet dominance in your survival journey.
This pack transforms the Totem of Undying into **Sōsuke Aizen**, designed with a composed and intimidating pixel-art style that reflects his presence as one of anime’s most iconic antagonists.

✨ Features

- ✔️ Custom Totem of Undying texture – Sōsuke Aizen
- ✔️ Minimal, authoritative pixel-art design
- ✔️ No mods required (vanilla compatible)
- ✔️ Works across Minecraft 1.8 → 1.21+
- ✔️ Optimized and lightweight

### 📥 Installation

1. Download → Resourcepacks folder → Enable in-game

### 📌 Notes

Fan-made, non-official Bleach content.

### 🖌️ Credits

Created by **Totem Factory DBX**

Inspired by **Bleach** by Tite Kubo
